637.reason: Error: outputting component name after each child instead of after all children; should be moved outside the loop to match expected output format.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: outputting component name after each child instead of after all children; should be moved outside the loop to match expected output format.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The syntax component name is incorrectly printed inside the loop after each child node, causing it to be output multiple times. It should be printed only once after all children have been processed.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This outputs the syntax component name AFTER processing children, but the problem requires that syntax components (except <BlockItem>, <Decl>, <BType>) should output their name BEFORE analyzing their contents. The component name should be printed before processing children, not after.]

739.reason: [This lookahead consumes up to 3 tokens and then unmatches them, but the condition checks for ASSIGN/LBRACK/COMMA/SEMICN which may not be sufficient to distinguish VarDecl from FuncDef; also, unmatch(3) assumes exactly 3 tokens were consumed, but the first two matches might succeed while the third fails, leading to incorrect unmatch count]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  The lookahead logic incorrectly assumes exactly 3 tokens are consumed regardless of short-circuit evaluation, leading to incorrect pos restoration with unmatch(3).
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This lookahead consumes up to 3 tokens and then unmatches them, but the condition checks for ASSIGN/LBRACK/COMMA/SEMICN which may not be sufficient to distinguish VarDecl from FuncDef; also, unmatch(3) assumes exactly 3 tokens were consumed, but the first two matches might succeed while the third fails, leading to incorrect unmatch count]

741.reason: [Incorrect unmatch count: if the third match (ASSIGN/LBRACK/etc.) fails, only 2 tokens were consumed, but unmatch(3) rewinds too far]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  unmatch(3) is unsafe because the number of successfully matched tokens may be less than 3 due to short-circuiting, causing token stream desynchronization.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect unmatch count: if the third match (ASSIGN/LBRACK/etc.) fails, only 2 tokens were consumed, but unmatch(3) rewinds too far]
